MINI MINUTES: PETITIONERS THE BOARD OF TRUSTEES, CARPENTERS VACATION-HOLIDAY, CARPENTERS PENSION TRUST FUND FOR NORTHERN, CARPENTERS ANNUITY TRUST FUND FOR NORTHERN, CARPENTERS TRAINING TRUST FUND FOR NORTHERN, NORTHERN CALIFORNIA CARPENTERS REGIONAL COUNCIL'S PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD.
